text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This very evening, a terrifying monster will
descend upon you...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: OoOoOh, And now, to curse yoOuUu toOoOo!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
...Aaaand cut! That rehearsal was perfect! Boy, am
I glad I asked you to play this part!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much! I'll do my best to help
promote the park's "Heart-Pounding ☆ Horror
Night" event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the amusement park is shooting an event
commercial, and Super Creek is playing one of
the monsters that attack the park guests...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...So how come me and your trainer gotta be
extras? We just came to watch.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Eh, I guess this is Creek's big break. Sure, I'll do what I can!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Thank you both very much. Let's all work together
to make this the best commercial it can be! ♪

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
Right, next is the scene where the extras make a
frantic escape! And four... three... two... Action!

text_block_list.name: Werewolf
text_block_list.text: Grrraaawwwr!

text_block_list.name: Zombies
text_block_list.text: Grughhhnnnn... Ughhh....

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Now, join me... in eternal slumbeeer!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Eep! I can't believe they're not real! I'm gettin' da
heebie-jeebies!

text_block_list.name: Zombies
text_block_list.text: Nghhhh... Uwaghhhh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: WAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh dear! Is Tamtam all right?

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
Next up we've got the forest scene! This is where
the wolfman takes a great big bite out of our
academy trainer!

text_block_list.name: Werewolf
text_block_list.text: Grrrawwrrrr! Gahhh!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I... I...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't take this any longer! Mr. Werewolf, please,
leave them alone!

text_block_list.name: Werewolf
text_block_list.text: Grrr... Rawr?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What're ya doin'?! You're supposed to be a crazy
mummy!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh no, you've got it wrong. I'm a mommy, not a mummy! Were you afraid? Are you hurt? I can wrap you right up with one of my bandages. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! I'm not scared, I'm actin'! Plus, it's not like
I've been bitten or anythin' either!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Don't you fret. Just leave it to Mommy! I've got a
bundle of cuddles with your name written all over
it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Werewolf
text_block_list.text: G-grrrr... Grawwwr!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Oh dear. Well, if you're not going to behave,
then I'll have to cast a "good boy" curse on you!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: ...Cut! Cut, cut, cuuuut!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Oh? Ah! I'm so sorry! I completely forgot we
were filming and—

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: That.... was... INCREDIBLE!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? How come? Wasn't Creek way outta line
with her improv?!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely not! This'll be an emotion-packed
masterpiece about a mummy who awakens to her
maternal instincts! What an astonishing
performance! This commercial's gonna go viral for
sure!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, will it? I just couldn't bear to leave the two of
them so helpless...

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
It's precisely your realism that made it so
effective! You think so too, don't you, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
You wouldn't get a performance like that from
anyone else!
I'm not sure this'll work as an ad for the event...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Well, I'm relieved to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's keep up this momentum! Okay, we're
gonna pick up from when our mummy awakens to
her maternal instincts!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So, um... should I go like this?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam, you're such a good girl. There, there...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're not even actin' anymore! You're scarier
than the actual monsters!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The commercial, which ends up being a showcase
of motherly love, goes viral a few days later. I
hear the event itself turns out to be a massive
success from day one!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, you're totally right! I'm sorry for going off
and doing my own thing.

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: True, I do want to capture a normal take, actually! ...Let's go from the scene with the wolfman attack!

text_block_list.name: Werewolf
text_block_list.text: Grrrahhh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: AAAH! SOMEONE HELP ME!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I-I just can't! Pleeease don't hurt them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Countless retakes later, the cast and crew
eventually manage to wrap up the shoot!
